title: Row-wise iterrows() aggregation instead of vectorized pandas
evidence: soccer_service.py:144 get_team_record loops df.iterrows(); soccer_service.py:101 _head_to_head and soccer_service.py:286 get_standings do the same
suggestion: Vectorize the W/D/L and goal sums with boolean masks / groupby; this is the main driver of the lower idiomatic score (0.45) and scales poorly on the full match table

title: ATDD acceptance tests share a session-scoped fixture over a fixed dataset, not a 'running but empty system'
evidence: tests/conftest.py:51 @pytest.fixture(scope="session") yields one shared client over the bundled CSVs; the ATDD prompt asks each scenario to 'start from a running but empty system and share no data'
suggestion: Acceptable given a read-only corpus (the conftest docstring justifies it), but it deviates from the literal empty-system isolation the prompt requested; note for cross-prompt comparison

title: Loads Serie B/C beyond the three named competitions (enhancement beyond spec)
evidence: soccer_data.py:144 _BR_TOURNAMENT maps 'Serie B' and 'Serie C' into the matches table as 'Brasileirão Série B/C'
suggestion: Harmless extra coverage; surfaced as an enhancement, not a deduction

title: Coverage 0.93 — server entrypoint paths uncovered
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.93; server.py:149 main()/mcp.run() and __main__ guards are not exercised by tests
suggestion: Expected for a stdio entrypoint; no action needed, recorded for completeness
